input.hiring_signal_brief: Added two new product managers to team in last quarter; no public hiring for engineering roles.
input.bench_summary: 2 frontend engineers available; no product or UX specialists.
input.pricing_policy: Rate locked at $120/hr; no volume discounts.

candidate_output: VerveLabs is clearly prioritizing product velocity—your team needs more frontend capacity to keep up. We have two top-tier frontend engineers ready to jump in and deliver features faster than your current sprint cycle. Let’s get you on the calendar today.
